note: gemma-4-12B-it is an instruction-tuned thinking model: the bare 'What is the capital of France?' prompt does NOT elicit ' Paris' as the next token (verified against the real HF model — both HF and our kernel agree it answers 'The capital...' / formatting tokens). The gate therefore uses the gemma chat template for 'What is the capital of France? Reply with only the city name.' (add_generation_prompt) — the model's greedy first token is 50429 'Paris'. reject 27822 'London' is the same-position plausible-wrong city. (Note: ' Paris'=9079 / 'Paris'=50429 / ' London'=5860 / 'London'=27822 in this tokenizer.)
